Row.Text: Mycenaean Unique Quarter. Created by constructing the Megaron and the Cyclopean Wall in the same District. +2 [icon:YIELD_FOOD] Food for every connected Settlement. +2 [icon:YIELD_FOOD] Food in all [icon:YIELD_TOWNS] Towns.

Mycenaean Unique Quarter. Created by constructing the Megaron and the Cyclopean Wall in the same District. +2 [icon:YIELD_FOOD] Food for every connected Settlement. +2 [icon:YIELD_FOOD] Food in all [icon:YIELD_TOWNS] Towns.
Mycenaean Unique Happiness Building. +3 [icon:YIELD_HAPPINESS] Happiness. +1 [icon:YIELD_GOLD] Gold adjacency for Quarters and Wonders. Ageless.

Mycenaean Unique Production Building and [icon:Action_Fortify] Fortification. +3 [icon:YIELD_PRODUCTION] Production. +2 [icon:YIELD_DIPLOMACY] Influence if placed on [icon:CITY_UNIMPROVED] Rough Terrain. +1 [icon:YIELD_PRODUCTION] Production adjacency for Wonders. Ageless.
+2 [icon:YIELD_DIPLOMACY] Influence if placed on [icon:CITY_UNIMPROVED] Rough Terrain.[n]Mycenaean Unique Building.

+25% [icon:YIELD_PRODUCTION] Production towards [icon:Action_Fortify] Fortifications. +1 [icon:YIELD_FOOD] on [icon:Action_Fortify] Fortifications in all Settlements. Acts as a [icon:CITY_FORTIFIED] Fortified District that must be conquered. Ageless. Must be placed on Rough Terrain.

+25% [icon:YIELD_PRODUCTION] Production towards [icon:Action_Fortify] Fortifications. +1 [icon:YIELD_FOOD] Food on [icon:Action_Fortify] Fortifications in all Settlements. Acts as a [icon:CITY_FORTIFIED] Fortified District that must be conquered. [N]Must be placed on Rough Terrain.
